dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Get a complete overview of your day at a glance: schedule, todos, and spending.

finance.title: Finance Management
finance.desc: Track family income and expenses transparently with detailed charts and reports.

calendar.title: Shared Calendar
calendar.desc: Manage events and reminders together, syncing personal schedules seamlessly.

todo.title: Daily Tasks
todo.desc: Shared or private todo lists with deadlines and clear assignments.

period.title: Period Tracker
period.desc: Subtle and smart cycle tracking to better prepare for health and well-being.

goals.title: Future Planning
goals.desc: Plan and track progress for big goals: buying a house, a car, or traveling.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.desc: Collaborative shopping labels, updated instantly while you're at the store.

special_days.title: Special Day Reminders
special_days.desc: Never forget anniversaries, birthdays, or important holidays again.

journal.title: Journal & Notes
journal.desc: Capture happy moments or sudden bright ideas together in one place.

chores.title: House Chores
chores.desc: Share family duties fairly with automated rotation and reminders.

stats.title: Life Statistics
stats.desc: A holistic view of your habits, task completion, and savings progress.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.desc: Timely alerts for new tasks, upcoming birthdays, or even running out of groceries.

common.features_section_subtitle: Everything you need to keep your home happy and organized.

dashboard.subtitle: Which home do you want to visit today?

common.heroDescription: A shared space for the whole family to share, plan, and keep everyday life organized.

auth.login_description: Enter your email and password to continue
auth.register_description: Create an account to start building your home
auth.name: Full Name

validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters

about.hero_description: We don't just build software, we build bridges of connection for every Vietnamese home.
about.story_p1: Founded in 2026 in Hanoi City, HomieTech Solutions started from a group of engineers who were also busy with life. We realized that modern life is making our families too busy with many tasks, and management tools are too scattered.
about.story_p2: My Homie was born with the mission to become the only 'digital home' — where all members can share costs, plan for special occasions, and keep the flame of happiness sustainable.
about.value1_desc: Every feature is designed to encourage interaction and sharing among members.
about.value2_desc: We listen to feedback from thousands of families to bring the warmest, friendliest experience.
about.value3_desc: Family data is the most valuable asset. We are committed to protecting your privacy as our own family.
about.footer_title: Are you ready to connect more?
about.footer_desc: Let HomieTech accompany you on the journey to build a modern, organized, and happy home.

org.no_orgs: You haven't joined any family yet.
org.create_description: A family is a private space to share finances and plans with your loved ones.

homes.not_found_desc: Please check the link or your access permissions.
homes.members_list_desc: Relatives who are managing this home with you.
